steps.title: Meet both note goals
steps.content: The student wants to define Lazarus species and provide an example. The notes define the term as a living species once believed extinct and identify the mountain pygmy possum as one.

steps.title: Reject one-part responses
steps.content: Choice B gives an example without defining the term. Choice C gives a fact about the possum but not the term. Choice D gives only the general idea without naming the example. The complete choice does both tasks. The answer is A.
